headline: Jeremy Sarmiento
body: Good luck to Jeremy Sarmiento who has completed a permanent move to Middlesbrough, for undisclosed terms. Wishing you all the best, Jeremy! 💙🤍 Link 🔗 brightonandhovealbion.com
